metadata.description: On Bean Box, select a monthly subscription plan (monthly curated coffee box), choose 6-cup size with ground coffee, and reach the checkout page with shipping and payment details filled in.

instruction: On Bean Box, select a monthly subscription plan (monthly curated coffee box), choose 6-cup size with ground coffee, and reach the checkout page with shipping and payment details filled in.
